DiveFree Logo Color Type Spacing Components Buttons Icons Motion Voice
Brand Guidelines
DiveFree
A freediving session logger for Apple Watch Ultra + iPhone. Design language built around depth, clarity, and calm focus.
v0.1.0 · 2026
Identity

Logo

The wordmark uses SF Pro Rounded Bold. The icon mark is a stylised wave rendered in the accent-to-secondary gradient. Never alter the gradient direction or aspect ratio.

DiveFree
Go deeper. Track smarter.
DiveFree
Go deeper. Track smarter.
Visual Language

Color

A monochromatic deep-ocean palette. Every color is an ocean depth — from midnight trench to sunlit surface. Asset catalog tokens are the source of truth in code.

Midnight
#0E2961
BackgroundColor
App background. The abyss. Never use on text.
Sky Blue
#4EACF3
AccentColor
Buttons, interactive elements, highlights, links.
Seafoam
#C0E4F7
PrimaryText
Headings, key data, depth readout. Primary reading text.
Ocean
#3E8BE1
SecondaryText
Labels, captions, supporting metadata. Never for critical info.
Contrast Ratios · WCAG AA requires ≥ 4.5 : 1
PrimaryText on Background ≈ 9.8 : 1 ✓ AAA AccentColor on Background ≈ 5.2 : 1 ✓ AA SecondaryText on Background ≈ 3.7 : 1 ⚠ AA Large only
SecondaryText passes AA for large text (≥18pt regular or ≥14pt bold). Use it only for labels and captions — never for body copy or key data.
Visual Language

Typography

SF Pro Rounded throughout — it's warm, legible on small watch screens, and feels appropriately sporty. All sizes follow the iOS Dynamic Type scale.

18.4
Depth Readout 64 – 72 pt · Weight 700 · Tracking −4% · Tabular nums
PrimaryText · Used for the hero depth value only
Session Active
Large Title 34 pt · Weight 700 · Tracking −2%
PrimaryText · Screen titles, empty states
Freedive
Headline 22 pt · Weight 600 · Tracking −1%
PrimaryText · App name on idle screen, section headings
3 dives completed today
Body 17 pt · Weight 400
PrimaryText · Summaries, descriptions
CURRENT DEPTH
Caption / Label 11 – 13 pt · Weight 500 · Tracking +4% · Uppercase
SecondaryText · Field labels, unit labels
04:27
Timer / Monospaced Data 20 pt · Weight 400 · Tabular nums · Tracking +2%
SecondaryText · Elapsed time, surface interval
Layout

Spacing

An 8-pt base grid. Multiples of 8 for layout; 4 pt for tight internal gaps.

4 pt
Tight — icon-to-label, within a stat cell
8 pt
Default inner gap — between related elements
16 pt
Card padding, section content gap
24 pt
Large separation — between distinct UI sections
32 pt
Screen edge padding on iPhone
48 pt
Section separation, generous breathing room
Corner Radii
4 pt
Tags, chips
8 pt
Small buttons
16 pt
Cards, large buttons
Full
Pills, capsule buttons
UI Patterns

Components

Core display components for the active session screen. Data density is intentional — divers glance, not read.

Depth Readout
18.4m
Current Depth
Session Stats
04:27
3 dives · 22.1 m max
3
Dives
22.1
Max m
1:42
Best
UI Patterns

Buttons

Four button styles. Use Primary for the one key action per screen. Never show two Primary buttons simultaneously.

Start
Primary
Mark Dive
Secondary
Details
Ghost
End Session
Destructive
Visual Language

Iconography

SF Symbols only. Weight matches surrounding text weight. Fill variants for active/selected state.

🌊Idle home
⬇️Descent
⬆️Ascent
⏱️Timer
📍Location
🗂️Sessions
📊Stats
❤️Heart rate
🔔Haptic
⚙️Settings
SF Symbol names
water.waves arrow.down.circle arrow.up.circle timer location.fill list.bullet.rectangle chart.xyaxis.line heart.fill
Interaction

Motion

Calm and purposeful. Animations should feel like water — smooth, never snappy. Reserve emphasis animations for dive events only.

Depth update
.animation(.smooth)
Continuous depth number transition
Screen transition
.easeInOut(0.3s)
Idle → Active, session end
Dive detected
.spring(0.4s, bounce 0.2)
Dive count increment, haptic pulse
Button press
.easeOut(0.15s)
Scale 0.96 on press, 1.0 on release
Stat reveal
.easeOut(0.25s) + delay
Post-session summary cards stagger in
Content

Voice & Tone

Precise and minimal. A diver in the water can't read. Every word must earn its place.

Precise

Use numbers, not adjectives. Show the depth, not "quite deep".

✓ Do
18.4 m · 1:42
✗ Don't
You dove pretty deep!

Calm

No exclamation marks. No urgency theatre. Quiet confidence.

✓ Do
Session complete
✗ Don't
Great dive! Session saved!

Minimal

Labels not sentences. If a number speaks, don't add words.

✓ Do
Current Depth
✗ Don't
Your current depth is

Direct

Actions are verbs. No "would you like to" — just the action.

✓ Do
End Session
✗ Don't
Stop recording my session
